title: Flynn Rider Meets Rapunzel… and Her Frying Pan! 🍳 | Tangled | Disney Kids
description:
When Flynn Rider sneaks into a mysterious tower, he never expects to meet Rapunzel… or her frying pan! 🍳 Watch this hilarious scene from Disney’s Tangled as Rapunzel and Flynn have their unforgettable first encounter.

Uncover the magic with our newest tale! Let the adventure begin - watch now! 🚀🌈
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n9vgqxc1kL8
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-ySJD6l3tog
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bU2ygNtaNug

Disney’s Tangled is a fun and magical adventure about Rapunzel, a princess with super-long, glowing hair who has never left her tower. When she meets Flynn Rider, a charming thief, they go on an exciting journey filled with adventure, friendship, and lots of laughs! ✨🌸

Tangled is available to watch on Disney+ https://ondisneyplus.disney.com/ 

Welcome to the enchanting world of the Disney Kids YouTube channel – your portal to a realm where magic knows no bounds! 🌟 Here, young hearts and minds can immerse themselves in a dazzling array of exclusive Disney content designed to inspire joy, wonder, and endless smiles. From sing-a-longs with beloved Disney tunes to behind-the-scenes looks at your favorite tales, and sneak peeks at the latest trailers – our channel is a never-ending celebration of the stories and characters that have captured imaginations for generations.
